Inventory-linked accounts

Inventory accounting support for purchase and sales entry capture.

Inventory-heavy businesses need accurate purchase and sales records. Fastbooks helps prepare accounting entry drafts from bills, notes and transaction context.

Request Early Access See Tally workflow page

Feature workflow

How this fits into Indian accounts work.

Purchase bill capture

Capture item and supplier context from bills before it becomes month-end backlog.

Sales and receipt context

Prepare entries around stock-linked sales and payments.

Review-first workflow

Accountants can review entries and stock-linked assumptions before final use.

FFastbooks

Accounting software for Indian businesses that prepares sales, purchase, expense and bank entries from everyday inputs for accountant review.
